chunks.text: Student Award: Lotfi A. Zadeh Prize | EECS at UC Berkeley Lotfi A. Zadeh Prize This award recognizes a graduating PhD student who has made outstanding contributions to soft computing and its applications. It was established in 2020 in honor of EECS Prof. Lotfi Zadeh, the creator of the concept of fuzzy logic. Awardees 2024-2025 Sam Gunn, Atsunobu Kotani, Chinmay Maheshwari, Haozhi Qi, Ilija Radosavovic 2023-2024 Kaylo Littlejohn 2022-2023 Sheng Shen 2021-2022 Hari Prasanna Das 2020-2021 Xiangyu Yue 2019-2020 Baihong Jin, Yang You
